Pricing

Session
Options

All sessions delivered at Function Well West End, Brisbane. Structured, evidence-based programming — not generic PT. Every session has a purpose and a measurable outcome.

30 Minute Session
$ 100 / session

High-intensity, focused training for experienced clients who know the movements and want maximum output in minimum time.

  • Targeted strength or conditioning work
  • Progressive overload programming
  • Form coaching and cues
  • Post-session notes and tracking
Book This Session
45 Minute Session
$ 150 / session

The full experience. More time for warm-up, complex movement patterns, accessory work, and a thorough debrief on nutrition and recovery.

  • Full warm-up and activation
  • Structured strength programming
  • Accessory and mobility work
  • Nutrition and recovery coaching
  • Post-session notes and tracking

The Experience

What To Expect

01

No Wasted Time

Every session is pre-planned and purposeful. You'll know exactly what you're doing, why you're doing it, and how it fits into your broader program before you walk in.

02

Evidence-Based Programming

No fads, no gimmicks. Progressive overload, intelligent load management, and real coaching on movement quality — the fundamentals that actually produce results.

03

Accountability Beyond the Session

Training is one part of the equation. Nutrition guidance, recovery coaching, and between-session support ensure the hour you put in translates to visible change.

20+
Years Elite
Coaching
Your Coach

Why Train
With Terry

Throughout my career I've specialised in structured, progressive resistance training combined with evidence-based nutrition to achieve consistent fat loss and muscle development. My coaching is systems-driven: clear performance metrics, progressive overload frameworks, strategic calorie manipulation, and accountability that ensures execution.

I coach advanced resistance training safely and effectively while managing recovery, injury risk, and long-term adherence. My client base includes executives and high-performance professionals who want to build muscle, lose fat, and perform better — without it taking over their life.

20+ Years Specialist Experience — Strength & Body Composition
Evidence-Based Nutrition & Progressive Overload Methodology
Advanced Resistance Training & Injury Risk Management
Fat Loss, Recomposition & Strength Development Specialist
Executive & High-Performance Professional Coaching
